adminMaintenance.title: Maintenance mode
adminMaintenance.description: When enabled, normal entry shows a countdown modal while the dedicated entry bypasses it and can auto-login a UID.
adminMaintenance.enabledHint: Public APIs return maintenance status while admin and service entry remain available.
adminMaintenance.borderSettingsHint: Show an edge border after entering through the service-mode link.

adminDatabase.repairConfirm: Run non-destructive repair? Invalid indexes are replaced only after a temporary unique index succeeds; business rows are never deleted or merged.
adminDatabase.repairBlocked: Safe repairs completed; {count} duplicate-data blockers remain.
adminDatabase.duplicateSummary: {groups} duplicate key groups with {rows} extra rows; resolve them manually and retry.
adminDatabase.title: Database manager
adminDatabase.description: Inspect table size, estimated column size, missing indexes, and run safe one-click correction.
adminDatabase.indexAuditDescription: Checks missing items against GORM models and the desired index registry.
adminDatabase.noIssues: No missing fields or indexes found
adminDatabase.vacuumSaveFailed: Failed to save auto optimize settings
adminDatabase.vacuumDescription: Run plain VACUUM ANALYZE on selected PostgreSQL tables to refresh planner stats and reclaim reusable space.
adminDatabase.vacuumUnsupported: VACUUM ANALYZE settings are unsupported for this database

mediaLibrary.unrestrictedUploadHint: Any file type or extension is supported.

errors.forbidden: This session does not have administrator access.
errors.invalidCredentials: The username or password is incorrect.
errors.locked: Too many failed attempts from this IP. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

reason.label: Reason (optional)
reason.placeholder: Add an operator note for the points ledger

onboardingSettingsPanel.title: Onboarding Settings
onboardingSettingsPanel.description: Configure onboarding availability, skip behavior, interest choices, and points copy
onboardingSettingsPanel.resetDescription: Clears every user's onboarding completion flag so users without a completed database record will see onboarding again.
onboardingSettingsPanel.resetConfirm: Reset onboarding completion for all users?
onboardingSettingsPanel.resetSingleDescription: Enter a numeric ID, user ID, or XiSe ID to make only that user see onboarding again.
onboardingSettingsPanel.resetSinglePlaceholder: User ID, numeric ID, or XiSe ID

hints.enabled: When enabled, signed-in users without a completed onboarding record in the database will see the onboarding dialog.
hints.allowSkip: When disabled, users must complete onboarding and cannot skip it.
hints.interestOptions: Use the list below to add, remove, or edit interest choices. You can also paste one per line or JSON such as ["Bondage", "Handcuffs", "Leg irons"].
hints.customFields: Supports JSON or multiline text for extending onboarding form fields.
hints.pointsIntroDetail: Shown when users view details after completing onboarding.
hints.minInterests: Only applies when interests are shown and required.
hints.walletUrl: Destination for the points entry in the completion dialog. Use an internal path or a full URL.

onboardingSettingsPanel.emptyInterestOptions: No interest options yet. Add one to create the list.

hiddenWatermarkAccessPanel.title: Hidden Watermark Access
hiddenWatermarkAccessPanel.description: Control whether regular users can use the frontend hidden watermark inspector

watermarkConfig.title: Hidden Watermark Configuration
watermarkConfig.reference: Based on watermark_zero: the author strongly recommends WithGolay. Higher D1/D2 improves compression resistance but degrades image quality; smaller blocks increase capacity but can add noise. Odd block sizes are rounded up to even values, with a minimum of 4.

hints.enabled: When off, normal uploads skip hidden watermarking; protected packages still force trace watermarks.
hints.protectedOnly: When on, uploads keep clean originals and watermarks are embedded only while generating a buyer's protected download package.
hints.includeUid: Stores the internal database UID for the strongest traceability.
hints.includeUserId: Stores the public user ID for manual review.
hints.includeUsername: Stores nickname or username. This has higher privacy exposure and is off by default.
hints.includeTime: Stores the UTC time when the watermark is generated.
hints.includeFileHash: Stores a source-hash fragment for origin checks.
hints.includeCustom: Stores the custom marker below in the trace database; it is not embedded in the image token.
hints.customText: Up to 255 characters in the trace database.
hints.coefficientMode: WithD1 is cheaper; WithD1D2 is usually more robust but heavier.
hints.eccMode: The author strongly recommends WithGolay; WithoutECC is for compatibility or experiments.
hints.golaySeed: Deterministic shuffle seed for WithGolay; extraction must use the same seed.
hints.blockShape: Smaller blocks increase capacity but can add noise. The library requires even values of at least 4.
hints.d1d2: Higher values resist attacks/compression better, but may affect image fidelity.
hints.engine: Choose the Go local algorithm or the internal FastAPI remote service.
hints.remoteEngine: Auto tries blind_watermark first, then switches to DWT-DCT-SVD short codes after a failure.
hints.remotePasswordWm: blind_watermark password_wm. Embed and extract must use the same value.
hints.remotePasswordImg: blind_watermark password_img. Embed and extract must use the same value.
hints.remoteBlockShape: Block size for the remote blind_watermark algorithm. Smaller blocks increase capacity but may affect fidelity.
hints.remoteD1D2: D1/D2 strength for the remote blind_watermark algorithm. Higher values resist compression better but can degrade image quality.
hints.remoteProfile: Adaptive starts normal images at 18/8; protected images start at 24/12 for stronger compression resistance.
hints.protectionMaxDimension: Defaults to 2048; use 0 to preserve original dimensions.
hints.protectionAllowedFailurePercent: Floored by total image count. For example, 20% on 10 images allows up to 2 skipped images. Skipped images are not written to the ZIP, and at least 1 image must succeed.
hints.protectionOutputMode: Lossless WebP maximizes fidelity; quality WebP reduces package size.
hints.protectionQuality: Used only for quality WebP output.
hints.remoteTimeout: Maximum time the Go backend waits for the remote watermark service; changes apply to the next task.
hints.remoteOperationTimeout: Per-operation timeout sent to the FastAPI watermark worker; keep it slightly below the remote request timeout.

current.title: Current Balance
current.description: Uses 8x6 / D1=21 / D2=9 / Golay so screenshots and recompressed images remain recoverable.

author_recommended.title: Author Recommended
author_recommended.description: Official default 8x8 / D1=21 / D2=9 / WithGolay, prioritizing stable extraction.

fidelity.title: Preserve Original
fidelity.description: Larger blocks and lower D1/D2 reduce noise and image-quality loss.

robust.title: Attack Resistant
robust.description: Smaller blocks and higher D1/D2 improve extraction after compression.

watermarkConfig.remoteReference: Remote mode uses guofei9987/blind_watermark 0.4.4, keeps the official 4x4 blocks, and sends matching password and D1/D2 values.

remoteOfficial.title: Recommended remote protection
remoteOfficial.description: The stable preset enables remote-first, automatic algorithm fallback, adaptive strength, a 50-second remote timeout, and lossless WebP for protected images.

extract.title: Hidden Watermark Extraction
extract.referenceDescription: For a cropped or resized screenshot, choose the complete watermarked image. The service recovers crop and scale with the official upstream flow before extraction.
extract.description: Admin only. The extracted short code is resolved through the trace database.
extract.recoveryFailed: Screenshot recovery failed. Verify that the reference is its complete watermarked image.
extract.remoteTimeout: The remote watermark service or gateway timed out. This does not mean the image has no watermark.
extract.remoteDisconnected: The remote watermark progress connection was interrupted. Try again later.

progress.queued: Received by server and waiting for processing
progress.estimated: The live stage is estimated from elapsed time. Do not submit the request again.
progress.live: Progress is reported by the server's actual processing stage.
progress.heartbeat: Server heartbeat is healthy; the task is still running.
progress.heartbeatEngine: The FastAPI engine heartbeat is healthy and the algorithm is still running.
progress.heartbeatGateway: The Go gateway is connected and waiting for the FastAPI engine.

extract.empty: Choose an image to view extraction results

global.title: Access Policy
global.description: By default, only administrators and allowlisted users can use it. Turn this on to allow every signed-in user to inspect from the frontend.

picker.title: Add Users
picker.description: Search for users and add them to the allowlist. Internal IDs and public account IDs are recorded together.
picker.addEmpty: Search and select users to authorize.

manual.title: Manual Add
manual.description: Add an internal ID, public user ID, Xise ID, username, or nickname directly.
manual.manualPlaceholder: Enter user ID, account, or nickname
manual.duplicate: This value is already in the list

lists.title: Allowlist
lists.description: A match on any ID or username entry grants access to the frontend inspector.
lists.userIdsHint: Supports internal numeric ID, public user_id, and Xise ID.
lists.usernamesHint: Supports nickname, username, or public account text.

usage.title: Recent 100 inspections
usage.loadFailed: Could not load hidden watermark inspection history
usage.empty: No hidden watermark inspection records yet

queuesPanel.title: Queues and Redis
queuesPanel.description: Inspect Asynq queues, Redis memory, task timing, and automatic cleanup policies
queuesPanel.serviceDisabled: The queue service is disabled; only empty state is available.

danger.title: Danger zone: delete the entire queue
danger.description: This deletes waiting, scheduled, retry, and historical tasks. Use Redis maintenance above for safe cleanup.

maintenance.title: Redis memory management
maintenance.loading: Loading Redis memory and cleanup policy
maintenance.description: Only disposable history, telemetry, cache, and stale indexes are cleaned.
maintenance.cacheConfirm: Clear application cache? Sessions and pending tasks will not be deleted.
maintenance.safeBoundary: Waiting, active, scheduled, and retry tasks are never deleted automatically.

memory.title: Memory pressure
memory.noLimitHint: Redis currently has maxmemory=0. The admin panel monitors and alerts but never changes the server memory limit.

inventory.title: Keyspace categories
inventory.sampled: Large keyspace; showing a bounded sample
inventory.noTtlSummary: {count} sampled keys have no TTL and are not marked permanent
inventory.expectedPermanentSummary: {count} sampled keys are expected permanent metadata

overrides.title: Per-queue overrides
overrides.description: Queues use the global policy by default; high-value video or audit queues can be retained longer.

settingsPanel.title: System Settings
settingsPanel.description: Unified configuration for booleans, numbers, dates, and text values

site_title.label: Homepage title
site_title.hint: Shown on the homepage, browser title, and share previews.

site_description.label: Homepage description
site_description.hint: Shown under the homepage title and in search/share summaries.

site_avatar_url.label: Website avatar URL
site_avatar_url.hint: Use a media-library /api/file/... path or a full http/https image URL.

post_content_max_length.label: Maximum post content length
post_content_max_length.hint: Limits content for publishing, drafts, editing, and admin creation. Default: 100000.

post_resource_section_position.label: Post resource section position
post_resource_section_position.hint: Places attachments, paid unlocks, and image packages before or after the content.

onboarding_interest_options.label: Onboarding interest options
onboarding_interest_options.hint: Provide one localized list for each supported language.

onboarding_points_intro_detail.label: Points introduction details
onboarding_points_intro_detail.hint: Shown when users view details after completing onboarding.

oauth2_app_callback_urls.label: App OAuth callback allowlist
oauth2_app_callback_urls.hint: Enter one full callback per line, for example xsewebfast://auth-return or yuempro://auth-return. Each app sends its own app_callback; the backend matches scheme, host, and path exactly before redirecting back.

app_download_android_version_code.label: Android version code

app_download_android_download_url.label: Android download URL

app_download_android_size_label.label: Android size label
app_download_android_size_label.hint: Shown before automatic size formatting, for example 18 MB.

app_download_android_size_bytes.label: Android package size (MB)
app_download_android_size_bytes.hint: Enter MB in admin; it is stored as bytes. Use 0 to hide.

app_download_android_fast_version_code.label: Android Fast version code
app_download_android_fast_version_code.hint: Numeric version used for display and client comparisons.

app_download_android_fast_download_url.label: Android Fast download URL
app_download_android_fast_download_url.hint: Use a media-library /api/file/attachments/... URL or a full URL.

app_download_android_fast_size_label.label: Android Fast size label
app_download_android_fast_size_label.hint: Shown before automatic size formatting, for example ≤ 1 MB.

app_download_android_fast_size_bytes.label: Android Fast package size (MB)
app_download_android_fast_size_bytes.hint: Enter MB in admin; it is stored as bytes. Use 0 to hide.

app_download_ios_version_code.label: iOS version code
app_download_ios_version_code.hint: Numeric version used for display and client comparisons.

app_download_ios_download_url.label: iOS download URL
app_download_ios_download_url.hint: Use an App Store, TestFlight, enterprise, or profile URL.

app_download_ios_size_bytes.label: iOS package size (MB)
app_download_ios_size_bytes.hint: Enter MB in admin; it is stored as bytes. Use 0 to hide.

file_recycle_retention_days.label: Recycle bin retention (days)
file_recycle_retention_days.hint: Number of days a recycled file is kept before automatic cleanup. Default: 30 days.

file_recycle_cleanup_interval_hours.label: Cleanup interval (hours)
file_recycle_cleanup_interval_hours.hint: How often the background task scans expired recycled files. Default: once every 24 hours.

notification_interaction_suppression_ena.label: Interaction notification suppression
notification_interaction_suppression_ena.hint: When enabled, extra like, comment-like, or save notifications from the same user to the same author are silently suppressed after the threshold.

notification_interaction_suppression_win.label: Suppression window (seconds)
notification_interaction_suppression_win.hint: Rolling counting window. Default 600 seconds, allowed range 60 to 86400.

notification_interaction_suppression_thr.label: Suppression threshold
notification_interaction_suppression_thr.hint: Number of same-type interaction notifications allowed in the window. Default 3, allowed range 1 to 100.

hints.videoCenterAccountCutoff: Users registered at or after this time will not see the Video Center. Leave blank to disable registration-time hiding.
hints.imageMaxDimension: Use 0 for no limit. Images keep their aspect ratio when resized.
hints.imageProcessingConcurrency: Hidden watermark processing is memory intensive; keeping this at 1 is recommended.
hints.imagePostMaxCount: Controls the image limit for one post and batch upload. Default 100, maximum 500.
hints.imageArchiveEnabled: When enabled, published posts reaching the threshold queue an all-images ZIP without blocking publication.
hints.imageArchiveThreshold: Automatically queues a ZIP when the image count exceeds this value. Default 25.
hints.imageLibvipsEnabled: Automatically rotates images, converts the source ICC profile to sRGB, and keeps only safe EXIF. Disable it to retain the original processing pipeline.
hints.imageProtectionEnabled: Lets authors protect non-cover images so viewers can only download a traceable watermarked ZIP.
hints.imageProtectionNoticeEnabled: Controls whether the publisher shows the protection explanation or globally-disabled notice.
hints.imageSelectAllEnabled: Hides Select All when disabled and prevents batch actions from targeting every image when none are selected.
hints.paidContentPaymentMethod: Controls whether authors can select this method for paid images. Moon Coin and points may both be enabled.
hints.paidContentPriceLimit: Controls the highest unlock price authors can enter for paid images.
hints.hiddenWatermarkCustomText: Stored in the trace record when the custom marker option is enabled; it is not embedded in the image token.

extract.description: Administrator only. The extracted short code is resolved through the trace database.

accessBlockPanel.title: IP / UA Access Block
accessBlockPanel.description: Block requests by exact IP, CIDR, User-Agent substring, or regex. Rules are matched from an in-memory snapshot before application routes run.
accessBlockPanel.disabledHint: Access blocking is currently disabled by ACCESS_BLOCK_DISABLED.
accessBlockPanel.formHint: Use batch paste for multiple IP, CIDR, or UA patterns. Force bypasses the self-lock guard.
accessBlockPanel.batchPlaceholder: One pattern per line. Empty lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
accessBlockPanel.force: Force save even if this rule matches the current admin request.

toasts.loadFailed: Failed to load access block rules
toasts.saveFailed: Failed to save access block rule
toasts.deleteFailed: Failed to delete access block rule
toasts.importSaveFailed: Failed to save URL import source
toasts.importSyncFailed: Failed to sync URL import source
toasts.importDeleteFailed: Failed to delete URL import source

accessBlockPanel.importFormHint: Fetch a plain text IP list where each line is one IP or CIDR. Empty lines and # comments are ignored.
accessBlockPanel.importForce: Force manual sync even if the imported list matches the current admin request.
accessBlockPanel.importDeleteConfirm: Delete this URL import source and its imported rules?

errors.selfLock: This rule would block the current admin request. Enable force only if you have a recovery path.
errors.importDisabled: URL imports are disabled on the server.
errors.importFetchFailed: Unable to fetch or parse the remote IP list.
errors.invalidRule: The access block rule is invalid.
